title: Medieval Miscellaneous
description: A mod adding all the nessicary miscellaneous items needed to make my other medival mods work, such as steel and its crafting process
body:
A mod required for my Mod "Medieval Weapons", adding survival craftability to weapons and tools, as well as some of its own small items and tools. This mod is currently still under developement, any suggestions or bug reports would be welcome in the Discord linked below.

Join the Discord (link below) to share your ideas and suggestions with me!

https://discord.gg/fexqTKtbHF

You may use this mod in your modpack as long as you provide a clickable link to it in the description.
